ddls:
CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "ndc_code" TEXT /* Unique National Drug Code for the product */,
  "proprietary_name" TEXT /* Proprietary name of the product */,
  "non_proprietary_name" TEXT /* Non-proprietary name (generic) of the product */,
  "dosage_form" TEXT /* Form of the dosage (e.g., tablet, capsule) */,
  "route_name" TEXT /* Route of administration (e.g., oral, injection) */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company that manufactures the product */,
  "product_type" TEXT /* Type of product (e.g., Human Prescription Drug, Veterinary Drug) */,
  "strength" TEXT /* Strength of the medication (e.g., 500mg) */,
  "formulation_date" TEXT /* Date when the product formulation was last updated */,
  "distribution_channel" TEXT /* Channel through which the product is distributed (e.g., retail, hospital) */,
  "regulatory_status" TEXT /* Current regulatory status (e.g., FDA approved, pending) */,
  "packaging_info" TEXT /* Information about the packaging (e.g., bottle, blister pack) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ndc_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the pharmaceutical company */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the company */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the company */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the company */,
  "founding_year" INTEGER /* Year the company was founded */,
  "ceo_name" TEXT /* Name of the CEO */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_approvals" (
  "approval_id" INTEGER /* Unique approval identifier */,
  "ndc_code" TEXT /* NDC code of the product */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date when the product was approved */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current approval status (e.g., approved, under review) */,
  "approval_agency" TEXT /* Regulatory agency that approved the product (e.g., FDA, EMA) */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date when the approval becomes effective */,
  "review_cycle" TEXT /* Review cycle or phase of the approval process (e.g., Phase 1, Phase 2) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("approval_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_approvals_ndc_code FOREIGN KEY ("ndc_code") REFERENCES products ("ndc_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_recalls" (
  "recall_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recall event */,
  "ndc_code" TEXT /* NDC code of the recalled product */,
  "recall_date" TEXT /* Date when the recall was issued */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the recall */,
  "action_taken" TEXT /* Actions taken as a result of the recall */,
  "recall_type" TEXT /* Type of recall (e.g., voluntary, mandatory) */,
  "recall_scope" TEXT /* Scope of the recall (e.g., all batches, specific lots) */,
  "recall_status" TEXT /* Current status of the recall (e.g., ongoing, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recall_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_recalls_ndc_code FOREIGN KEY ("ndc_code") REFERENCES products ("ndc_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "adverse_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each adverse event report */,
  "ndc_code" TEXT /* NDC code of the product associated with the event */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the adverse event */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the adverse event */,
  "reporter_info" TEXT /* Information about the person reporting the event */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the adverse event (e.g., mild, severe) */,
  "event_outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the adverse event (e.g., recovered, ongoing) */,
  "follow_up_date" TEXT /* Date of the follow-up report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_adverse_events_ndc_code FOREIGN KEY ("ndc_code") REFERENCES products ("ndc_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for system login */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* User's role (e.g., admin, researcher, analyst) */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department within the organization */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the information */,
  "ndc_code" TEXT /* NDC code of the product accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the access occurred */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., view, update) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client (e.g., browser and operating system) */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the access session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
